/CAL:RECEIPT OF SPR ELIGIBILITY & PC 4011,6 REPORTS; PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES 10021035 & 10003632/X:COURT HAS RECEIVED THE SUPERVISED PRETRIAL RELEASE (SPR) ELIGIBILITY REPORT & PC 4011,6 REPORT TODAY,/CTORD:THATSPR IS DENIED/CTORD:THAT THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES 10021035 &  10003632 IS GRANTED/GTWM/VD:JURY TRIAL OF 07-30-10/X:THIS DEFENDANTHAS SIX (6) OPEN MISDEMEANOR CASES: 10021035, 10003632, 10020397, 10021293,10010786 & 10012690,/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURSPC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:07-27-10/CONTD: IN DEPT, 7 FOR RECEIPT OF NEW PC 4011,6 REPORT FOR BHC PURPOSES ON 07-27-10/DOP/

/CAL:PRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE & STATUS OF NO-WARRANT HOLD IN CASE 10021293/X:THE NO-WARRANT HOLD IN CASE 10021293 WAS CHARGED AS A MISDEMEANOR IN DEPT, 17,/X:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES 10020397, 10010786, 10012690 & 10021293 FILED IN COURT TODAY,/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENSE MOTION FOR RELEASE ONOWN RECOGNIZANCE IS DENIED/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'SOFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:CHRISTOPHER HALL/NTW/LD:08-18-10/CONTD PC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:07-23-10/X:THIS DEFENDANT HAS SIX (6) OPEN MISDEMEANOR CASES: 10020397, 10010786, 10012690, 10021293, 10021035 & 10003632,/  CONTD SPR ELIG REPORT,DOP/CONTD:FOR SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT & RECEIPT OF PC 4011,6 REPORT AT  10:30 AM ON 07-23-10/DOP/CONTD:JURY TRIAL ON 07-30-10/DOP/

/CAL BENCH WARRANT RETURN/TN CHRIS LEBLANC/BWNDC/X #10021293 = NO WARRANT HOLD/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:FOR TRIAL IS 08-18-10/987,2/CONTD:07-21-10 STATUS OF NWH #10021293 & BAILREVIEW/DOP/CONTD:07-30-10 JURY TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL:TO BE SET/NP/DEF:IS IN SAFETY CELL TODAY/X:COURT DECLINED TO SEND DEFENDANT'S ALL SIX CASES TO CJC COURT,/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/DOPC/
